PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
SELECT ?bookLabel WHERE {
  ?celebrity wdt:P710 wd:Q3468953 .
  ?celebrity p:P2443 [ ps:P2443 ?stage ; pq:P585 ?date ] .
  FILTER(SUBSTR(STR(?date) , 1 , 10) = "2007-10-23")
  ?book wdt:P50 ?celebrity .
  ?book wdt:P577 ?bookDate .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?bookDate) , "2011"))
  OPTIONAL {
    ?book rdfs:label ?bookLabel
  }
  FILTER(lang(?bookLabel) = "en")
}
